must_detect.matched_text:
Portcrown Capital (HK) Ltd — Incident Summary (HK) and Training Addendum
Incident date/time: 12 May 2026 09:14 HKT; Classification: Operational/Cyber (Low)
Event: Mis-scoped API key at vendor NeonGate Systems (Asia) Ltd allowed read-only access to non-client log telemetry from a whitelisted IP; least-privilege restored within 27 minutes.
Impact: No personal data as defined under PDPO was processed or exposed; no client account, name, address, or identifier was present in the affected logs.
Regulatory: No reportable breach under SFC FMCC; internal record filed as Form IR-1; no disruption to HKEX trading or clearing connectivity.
Remediation: Rotated all API keys, enforced IP allowlists at vendor, and obtained updated third-party security attestation (SOC-lite) for Q2.
Training note: The 12 May tabletop also refreshed staff awareness on insider lists, blackout periods, tipping prohibitions, and maintenance of information barriers across research, investment, and corporate access teams.
Digital assets note: Our sandbox uses a non-transferable demo token “AmberBay Coin (test-net)” for education only; there is no fund exposure, custody, or client trading in crypto products.
ESG disclosure: The “2024 Climate Resilience Update” was published on our public website on 15 April and already announced via HKEX investor relations; it contains only high-level, non-price-sensitive information.
Commercial terms: Draft renewal with NeonGate Systems proposes a 60-day termination right and 99.9% SLA; operational negotiation only, not price sensitive or material to any listed security.
Pre-clearance (restricted): Preliminary pre-announcement diligence with Holystone Renewables Holdings Ltd. identified an unpatched endpoint at its data provider that may affect emissions metrics planned for its forthcoming HKEX circular; restrict circulation to Clean Team pending issuer disclosure.
Accordingly, add Holystone Renewables Holdings Ltd. to the event-specific insider list and apply a no-trade restriction on placeholder codes “0X0X” and “HK-9999” until Compliance clears; do not discuss outside established information barriers.
